pending.body: finding_summary: `build_e2e_milestone_scenario_fixture()` does not actually hand back usable preconfigured adapters. The returned `mock_br`/`mock_bv` are bare mocks (`src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:52-58,103-109`), but every dispatched response hard-fails unless the caller manually rebinds the adapter to `workspace.path()` (`src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:821-833`). The smoke test had to introduce a private `mutation_adapter()` helper and explicit `.with_working_dir(...)` calls to make the fixture usable (`src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:1043-1049,1181-1238`). That is a real trap because the rest of the repo normally consumes these mocks via `mock.as_br_adapter()` / `mock.as_mutation_adapter()` / `mock.as_bv_adapter()` directly (for example `tests/unit/controller_runtime_test.rs:341-345` and `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:16049-16050`). Any integration test that uses the new fixture the same way will fail with `no working directory configured` instead of exercising the scenario. affected_files: `src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs`, `src/test_support/br.rs`, `src/test_support/bv.rs`. remediation_hint: expose pre-bound `BrAdapter`/`BrMutationAdapter`/`BvAdapter` helpers from `E2eScenarioFixture`, or make the scenario mocks default their working directory to the temp workspace root so the existing convenience constructors remain usable.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 11 -> Plan and Implement
